name: modis_landcover_61
title: MODIS Land Cover (MCD12Q1, Version 6.1)
description: Annual global land cover type data product (MCD12Q1) using the IGBP Land Cover Type Classification. Derived from combined Terra and Aqua MODIS observations at 500m spatial resolution.
details: Tiles downloaded from LP DAAC LPCLOUD (C2484079608-LPCLOUD), extracted from HDF4 sinusoidal grid, mosaicked and reprojected to WGS84 (EPSG:4326).

processing_options.description: Land cover category proportions based on IGBP classification. Produces one column per category per year selected.
Total count of pixels per unit of analysis.

citation: Friedl, M., Sulla-Menashe, D. (2022). MODIS/Terra+Aqua Land Cover Type Yearly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V061. NASA EOSDIS Land Processes Distributed Active Archive Center. https://doi.org/10.5067/MODIS/MCD12Q1.061
